2303496.title: Pete Cipollone
2303496.extract: Peter M. "Pete" Cipollone (born February 5, 1971) is an American rowing coxswain of the 2004 Olympic gold medal-winning U.S. men's eight rowing team.  He is a native of Ardmore, Pennsylvania, and attended Saint Joseph's Preparatory School in Philadelphia and the University of California, Berkeley.  Cipollone won World Championships in the heavyweight men's eight in 1997, 1998, and 1999.
